description: Phase gate conditions for CTO lifecycle test. Each phase must pass ALL conditions before proceeding. If ANY condition fails, cleanup and restart from the beginning of that phase.
cleanupCommands: kubectl delete coderuns -n cto -l service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test --wait=false 2>/dev/null || true
kubectl delete pvc -n cto -l service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test --wait=false 2>/dev/null || true

intake.description: PRD → Tasks generation via Morgan agent

gates.description: Intake CodeRun exists and is processing
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=intake,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items | length > 0'
kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=intake,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items[0].status.phase == "Succeeded"'
gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --silent
gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -e '.tasks | all(.testStrategy != null and .testStrategy != "")'
gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/.tasks/docs/task-1 --silent
kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=implementation,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items | length > 0'

gates.description: CodeRun assigned to correct agent based on task agent_hint
gates.verifyCommand: EXPECTED_AGENT=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -r '.tasks[0].agent_hint'); ACTUAL_AGENT=$(kubectl get coderun -n cto -l type=implementation -o json | jq -r '.items[0].metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/agent-type"]'); [ "$EXPECTED_AGENT" = "$ACTUAL_AGENT" ]

gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=implementation,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items[0].status.phase == "Succeeded"'
gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state open --json number --jq 'length > 0'

gates.description: PR created by correct agent's GitHub App
gates.verifyCommand: EXPECTED_AGENT=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -r '.tasks[0].agent_hint'); PR_AUTHOR=$(gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state all --json author --jq '.[0].author.login'); echo "Expected agent: $EXPECTED_AGENT, PR author: $PR_AUTHOR"; [[ "$PR_AUTHOR" == *"$EXPECTED_AGENT"* ]] || [[ "$PR_AUTHOR" == "app/${EXPECTED_AGENT}-5dlabs" ]]
gates.errorMessage: PR author mismatch: Expected agent '{expected}' but PR created by '{actual}'

gates.description: Cleo CodeRun exists for quality review
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=quality,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items | length > 0'
kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=quality,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items[0].status.phase == "Succeeded"'

gh pr view --repo 5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test $(gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state all --json number --jq '.[0].number') --json reviews --jq '.reviews | map(select(.author.login | contains("cleo"))) | length > 0'

gates.description: Cipher CodeRun exists for security review
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=security,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items | length > 0'
kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=security,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items[0].status.phase == "Succeeded"'
kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=test,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items | length > 0'
kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=test,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items[0].status.phase == "Succeeded"'
kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=merge,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items | length > 0'
kubectl get coderuns -n cto -l type=merge,service=prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.items[0].status.phase == "Succeeded"'
gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state merged --json number --jq 'length > 0'

deploy-bolt.description: Deploy to Kubernetes via ArgoCD GitOps (Bolt)
deploy-bolt.notes: Bolt creates ArgoCD Application YAML in cto-apps repo, ArgoCD auto-syncs

gates.description: ArgoCD Application YAML created in cto-apps repo
gates.command: gh api repos/5dlabs/cto-apps/contents/preview --jq '.[].name' | grep -q 'alerthub'
kubectl get application -n argocd -l task-id=1 -o json | jq -e '.items[0].status.sync.status == "Synced"'
kubectl get pods -n alerthub -o json | jq -e '.items | length > 0 and all(.status.phase == "Running")'
kubectl run curl-test --rm -i --restart=Never --image=curlimages/curl -- curl -sf http://notification-router.alerthub.svc.cluster.local/health
